title: Dortmanna lucaeana
taxonomy: Dortmanna lucaeana is a species of flowering plant in the family Haloragaceae. It is a type of watermilfoil native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been introduced to other regions, including North America, where it can be found in freshwater environments. Dortmanna lucaeana is a perennial aquatic plant that thrives in slow-moving water. It is often classified as a noxious weed due to its ability to outcompete native species for resources.
